samples.decisionText:
DECISION SUMMARY
PR5B Simple Review Ltd (ARF-PR5B-001) is assessed as LOW risk with score 22/100. Recommendation: REVIEW - SCREENING RESOLUTION REQUIRED. Screening position: Sanctions screening status: PENDING — required screening has not yet returned a terminal provider result. Not recommended for approval while screening remains unresolved. Approval readiness: NOT READY. Primary blockers: Screening is not terminal / not approval-ready; company_screening:provider_pending_not_terminal; 1 document(s) outstanding: Bank Reference. Required next action: Complete live terminal screening and regenerate/revalidate this memo. Model confidence: 60%.
Recommended decision
REVIEW
Risk
LOW
Key risks: Canonical risk rating: LOW; recorded score: 22. Key risk-increasing factors: Documentation gap: 1 outstanding item(s); Screening dependency remains unresolved; Limited trading history reduces forward-loo
samples.validationText:
6.4
6.4 / 10 — Needs fixes before approval
Memo v1 | Validated: 2026-06-14 14:44:54
PASS WITH FIXES
ISSUES FOUND (10)
ℹ️
decision alignment: LOW-risk memo recommends REVIEW with a disclosed non-risk-rating control reason. This is not a contradiction.
💡 Fix: No action required — ensure the review reason remains visible in the memo.
🔴
screening: Screening truth remains approval-blocking (state=pending, disposition=unresolved). The memo cannot receive a clean validation pass until screening is formally resolved.
💡 Fix: Complete a valid screening disposition or EDD escalation and regenerate the memo before approval reliance.
🟡
screening: Screening matches found but no false positive analysis included.
💡 Fix: Add false positive determination for each screening match.
ℹ️
screening: Screening provider not explicitly named.
💡 Fix: Reference the screening data source for audit defensibility
